critical_discovery_20260416.scoring_card_bug: ALL PPO models v55-v294 are degenerate. legal_cards() never enforced scoring-card-must-be-played rule. Models learned to hold scoring cards → instant loss at end of turn. Fix: commit 5f8f4ea.

REVERTED: commit 90f663e. v296_sc-v298_sc trained on broken engine → discarded.

Only consolidate rule QUERIES (is_card_defcon_blocked, nato_prerequisite_met, is_trap_blocked) into rule_queries.hpp without removing decode fallbacks.
